recommended_repository.name: beniget
recommended_repository.rationale: Python static def-use chain analyzer with a pytest suite. Beniget supplies static definition-use pairs (C-Use, P-Use, cross-function, multiple definitions); coverage.py supplies execution witnesses (covered lines/branches, missing lines, reporting validation).

metrics.formula: c_use = len([d for d in definitions if d.user_count > 0 and d.has_c_use])
def_use_pairs = sum(d.user_count for d in definitions)
partial_uses = len([d for d in definitions if d.user_count == 0]) + len(missing_lines)
multiple_definitions = len([d for d in definitions if d.user_count > 1])
cross_function_uses = len([d for d in definitions if d.crosses_functions])
all_uses_coverage_percent = (len([d for d in definitions if d.user_count > 0]) / len(definitions)) * 100
